_comment_lora: Low rank is deliberate. Style is a thin manifold; high rank risks the model memorizing CONTENT (facts/decisions) which the Excel says must live in RAG. r=16 captures voice without overfitting knowledge.
_comment_targets: Phi-3.5-mini FUSES projections: qkv_proj (attn) and gate_up_proj (mlp), unlike Qwen/Llama which split them. These names must match the architecture or PEFT errors. If you switch back to a Qwen/Llama base, use: q_proj,k_proj,v_proj,o_proj,gate_proj,up_proj,down_proj.
_comment_epochs: 2-3 epochs only. Style saturates fast; more epochs make it parrot training phrases verbatim and erode generalization. Watch val loss for the turn.
